description: Sends messages to Slack channels or users. Can send text messages, rich blocks, and files.

requiredFields.label: Channel
requiredFields.description: The Slack channel ID or name to post to

optionalFields.label: Message Blocks
optionalFields.description: Slack Block Kit JSON for rich message formatting

optionalFields.label: Bot Username
optionalFields.description: Custom display name for the bot message

optionalFields.label: Thread Timestamp
optionalFields.description: Post as a reply in a thread (provide the parent message timestamp)

outputs.label: Message Timestamp
outputs.description: The Slack timestamp of the posted message

outputs.label: Channel ID
outputs.description: The channel where the message was posted
